phases: Define the writer API shape behind an explicit operator-approved promotion gate.
Implement the writer in a separate future patch with default-disabled registry and SQLite commits.
Require rollback contract coverage and targeted writer tests before any real write path can be enabled.
Promote only through a later guarded artifact that proves manual approval, rollback, and validation state.
required_guardrails: operator_approved must remain false until a future explicit approval artifact is validated
rollback contract coverage must remain green before any future writer code can be promoted
required_validation: strict TypeScript check for Hermes deployment plan and lifecycle tests
artifact assertion that registry_write_allowed, taskflow_registry_write, sqlite_write, worker_execution, and model_invoked stay false
implementation_plan.promotion_boundary: This artifact is a plan only. A future patch must add another read-only coverage report before any writer implementation exists.

guardrail_checklist.label: Consume a green final writer readiness summary before planning any real writer code.
Keep Task Flow registry writes disabled in the plan artifact.
Keep SQLite writes disabled in the plan artifact.
Do not execute workers from the plan artifact.
Do not invoke models from the plan artifact.
Require a future explicit operator review before any real writer implementation can be promoted.
Keep rollback contract coverage as a mandatory precondition for any future writer code.

blocked_actions: worker execution from real writer implementation plan
model invocation during real writer implementation plan
creating the real Task Flow registry writer in this step
automatic promotion from implementation plan to writer code
rollback_path: Discard this dry-run real writer implementation plan; it did not persist registry, SQLite, worker, or model state.
next_safe_task: Add a read-only real writer implementation plan coverage report before writing any real Task Flow registry writer code.
